title: Karnala Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Karnala Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Karnala Bird Sanctuary is located in Panvel Taluka of Raigad District, outside Mumbai, India near Matheran and Karjat.It is the first bird sanctuary in Maharashtra.
overview.description: The Karnala Bird Sanctuary is located in Panvel Taluka of Raigad District, outside Mumbai, India near Matheran and Karjat.It is the first bird sanctuary in Maharashtra. The sanctuary is quite small with an area of 12.11 square kilometres but is, along with the Sanjay Gandhi National Park and Tungareshwar Wildlife Sanctuary, one of the few sanctuaries to be within reach of the city of Mumbai.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Shirdhon
topPlaces.description: Shirdhon is a small village located in near Panvel in Raigad district in Maharashtra, India. It lies on Mumbai Goa National Highway NH 17.

topPlaces.name: Bhatan
topPlaces.description: Bhatan is a village located in Raigad district, Konkan division, in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is 9 km from the Mumbai–Pune Expressway, 10 km away from sub-district headquarter Panvel and 60 km away from district headquarter Alibag.

topPlaces.name: Rasayani
topPlaces.description: Rasayani is a town in the Khalapur taluka of the Raigad district, Maharashtra, India. It is 64 km from Mumbai and 100 km from Pune.

topPlaces.name: Majgaon, Mawal
topPlaces.description: Majgaon is a village in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 217 ha (536 acres).

topPlaces.name: New Panvel
topPlaces.description: New Panvel (Navé Panvel / मराठी: नवे पनवेल) is a residential, commercial and educational node of Navi Mumbai, Raigad District, Maharashtra and comes under the Konkan division. New Panvel was developed on marshy land and was previously a Mango cultivated area.

topPlaces.name: Sainagar
topPlaces.description: Sainagar is a large suburb of Panvel, located in Maharashtra, India. Sainagar has more than 5% of the population of the city of Panvel where more than 300,000 people live.

topPlaces.name: Ajivali
topPlaces.description: Ajivali is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 469 ha (1,159 acres).

topPlaces.name: Mohpada
topPlaces.description: Mohopada, alias Wasambe, is a census town in Khalapur Taluka, Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karnala Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karnala Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karnala Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karnala Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karnala Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karnala Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Karnala Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karnala Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shirdhon, Bhatan, Rasayani, Majgaon, Mawal, New Panvel.
